setTitle: REPLACE_ME - Short descriptive title of the set

questions.questionText: REPLACE_ME with the question stem. State a scenario, then ask for the best solution.

A.reason: Why A is correct or incorrect — be specific, not 'wrong answer'.

B.reason: Why B is the right answer — tie it back to a specific AWS concept or constraint.

C.reason: Why C is correct or incorrect.

D.reason: Why D is correct or incorrect.

questions.Tips: One-line mnemonic or hook to remember the concept.

questions.questionText: REPLACE_ME with a select-two-or-more style question. State which TWO actions are required.

A.reason: Why A is one of the correct answers.

B.reason: Why B is incorrect (or partial — explain what it leaves out).

C.reason: Why C is one of the correct answers.

questions.Tips: For multi-answer questions, name the trigger phrase in the stem ('Which TWO…') so learners can pattern-match in the exam.
